creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
If you refer to his changelog commit about 5.0.12 it hasn't actually been released yet. He has just added one line to the changelog for the next release.

He doens't really have a great way of releasing new releases.

If you check this commit for example:
https://github.com/happyfish100/fastdfs/commit/7042f8d06158192f6341be0045a119c6573c9f5e

He added stuff to the 5.0.11 release and changed the release date.

So I'm counting a "stable" release as when he tags the release on github.

( https://github.com/happyfish100/fastdfs/releases )

Currently only 5.0.11 has been released :)
